# hindclaw_strategy_scope (Resource)

Manages a retain strategy binding for a bank scope.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "hindclaw_strategy_scope" "alpha_topic" {
  bank_id     = "agent-alpha"
  scope_type  = "topic"
  scope_value = "12345"
  strategy    = "detailed"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `bank_id` (String) Bank identifier.
- `scope_type` (String) Scope type (e.g. topic, channel).
- `scope_value` (String) Scope value (e.g. topic ID).
- `strategy` (String) Retain strategy name.
